title: Reusable Plastic Zipper Freezer and sandwich Bags, Clear, 17.8 x 20.3 cm, Food Storage, 40-Pack
features: QUANTITY: Pack of 40 zipper freezer bags, perfect for food storage and organisation.
SIZE SPECIFICATIONS: Each bag measures 17.8 x 20.3 centimetres, providing ample space for storing various items.
DESIGN FEATURES: Easy-open and easy-seal zipper mechanism ensures convenient and secure closure.
MATERIAL: Constructed from durable PE material suitable for freezer storage.
PACKAGING: Compact retail box size of 19 x 5.5 x 5.5 centimetres for efficient storage and handling.
description: Rysons Zipper Freezer Bags offer practical food storage solutions with their convenient 40-piece set. Each bag measures 17.8 x 20.3 centimetres, providing ample space for storing various food items. The bags feature an easy-to-use zipper closure system that creates a reliable seal, helping to maintain food freshness in the freezer. Made from PE material, these bags are designed for durability and consistent performance. The thoughtful design incorporates a user-friendly opening and sealing mechanism, making them suitable for everyday household use. Whether you're meal prepping, storing leftovers, or organising your freezer contents, these bags offer a practical storage solution. The transparent material allows for easy identification of contents, while the secure closure helps prevent freezer burn and maintains food quality.
